description_long: This is a modern, compact electric sewing machine with a predominantly white plastic body and subtle teal accents. The front features a large, round stitch selector dial with clear markings, a smaller lever, and a rectangular control panel with a stylized graphic. The left side houses the needle assembly, presser foot, and thread guide, while the right side displays a prominent handwheel and a power socket. The back is mostly plain, with a few molded details and a label with technical information. The top includes a spool pin and thread guides, and the base is broad and flat for stability.
description: A compact white electric sewing machine with teal accents, a large stitch selector dial, and a visible handwheel. It features a modern design with a flat base and a clear control panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stitch selector dial, control panel, needle area, and presser foot.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the handwheel and power socket, with minimal other features visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back, molded details, and technical label.
description_view_3: Left side view focusing on the needle assembly and presser foot area.
attribute_brand_logo: A teal rectangular logo with a white stylized sunburst or gear graphic is visible on the upper right front panel. No readable text is present.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front right, featuring a large round stitch selector dial with clear markings, a smaller lever below, and a rectangular teal area with a graphic above. No digital screens are visible.
attribute_stitch_selector_dial: A large, round, white stitch selector dial with black markings and numbers is present on the front right of the machine.
